questionHtml: With reference to the curvature of your sketch in part (c)(iii), and without further calculation, explain whether you conjecture f ( 1.4 ) will be less than, equal to, or greater than your answer in part (a).
markschemeHtml:
the sketch shows that f is concave up       A1

Note: Accept f ′ is increasing.

this means the tangent drawn using Euler’s method will give an underestimate of the real value, so f ( 1.4 ) > estimate in part (a)       R1

Note: The R1 is dependent on the A1.

[2 marks]
